title: Agent Handoff Protocol
description: A standardized handoff document for transferring context between agents in SymbolOS.

handoff_id.description: Unique ID for the handoff, e.g., HO-20260210-001

from_agent.description: The name of the agent handing off the work.

to_agent.description: The name of the agent receiving the work.

timestamp.description: The ISO 8601 timestamp of the handoff.

scope.description: The privacy scope of the handoff context.

summary.description: A one-sentence summary of the work completed.

decisions_made.description: A list of key decisions made during the session.

open_items.description: A list of open questions or next actions for the receiving agent.

context_files.description: A list of file paths providing essential context for the handoff.

alignment_score.description: The self-reported alignment score of the session.

ring_state.description: The state of each of the 12 rings at the time of handoff.
